description: DB constraint chk_fair_prob_both_or_neither on market_universe — fair_over_prob/fair_under_prob must be both NULL or both non-NULL

pre_migration_check.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_universe WHERE (fair_over_prob IS NULL) != (fair_under_prob IS NULL)
pre_migration_check.verdict: SAFE — zero violating rows before migration

constraint_verification.query: SELECT constraint_name, constraint_type, check_clause FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc JOIN information_schema.check_constraints cc USING (constraint_catalog, constraint_schema, constraint_name) WHERE tc.table_name = 'market_universe' AND tc.constraint_name = 'chk_fair_prob_both_or_neither'

result.check_clause: (((fair_over_prob IS NULL) AND (fair_under_prob IS NULL)) OR ((fair_over_prob IS NOT NULL) AND (fair_under_prob IS NOT NULL)))

output_lines: ok 1 - database repository bundle persists a submission and settlement when Supabase is configured
ok 2 - UTV2-920: invalid atomic enqueue writes no lifecycle event or outbox row
ok 3 - UTV2-920: invalid atomic delivery confirmation rolls back outbox status, receipt, lifecycle, and audit writes
ok 4 - UTV2-920: invalid atomic settlement writes no settlement, lifecycle event, or audit row
ok 5 - UTV2-883: no duplicate participants for the same external_id and sport
ok 6 - UTV2-996: re-settling a settled pick creates correction — no true duplicate base rows
ok 7 - UTV2-996: correction chain is additive — original settlement row is not mutated

migration_reversibility: ALTER TABLE market_universe DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_fair_prob_both_or_neither;

r_level_compliance.R1: pnpm test PASS (covered by test:db run)
r_level_compliance.R2: pnpm type-check — no new TS changes (migration only)
r_level_compliance.R5: SHA binding set to post-main-merge commit: fe486882
